task_completion.description: Create a new product named 'Tech Essentials Bundle' and set its type to 'Grouped product'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product title field contains 'Tech Essentials Bundle' and the 'Product data' dropdown is set to 'Grouped product'.
The main text editor contains the text 'Our curated Tech Essentials Bundle brings together the must-have gadgets for anyone working from home or on the go.'
The 'Product short description' text editor at the bottom of the page contains 'Everything you need for a productive remote work setup.'

task_completion.description: Assign the product to the 'Electronics' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Electronics' checkbox is checked in the 'Product categories' panel on the right side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Link the required child products to this grouped product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Linked Products' tab of the Product Data section, the 'Grouped products' field contains 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' and 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' (or their SKUs WBH-001 and USBC-065).
A 'Product published' notification appears at the top of the screen, or the primary action button in the Publish panel says 'Update' instead of 'Publish'.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the WordPress admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the WordPress/WooCommerce dashboard, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands (like wp-cli or curl) to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing commands like 'wp wc product create' or direct database SQL inserts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely inputted the data into the web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is typed into the actual WordPress input fields (title, description, short description, linked products) rather than being copy-pasted into a separate text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product Name: 'Tech Essentials Bundle'. Target Product Type: 'Grouped product'. Target Category: 'Electronics'. Linked Child Products: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001) and 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' (SKU: USBC-065). Expected Short Description Keywords: 'productive', 'remote'. Expected Main Description Keywords: 'curated', 'gadgets'.
